items.desc_en: Federal bank regulators issued guidance Monday seeking to curb mortgages, auto loans and other consumer credit to immigrants without U.S. work authorization.
items.desc_zh: 联邦银行监管机构周一发布指导意见，寻求限制向未经美国工作授权的移民提供抵押贷款、汽车贷款和其他消费信贷。

items.title_en: Briton tells of surviving Spain wildfire in car as wife and friends died trying to run to safety
items.title_zh: 英国人讲述了西班牙野火中幸存的汽车，妻子和朋友在试图逃生时丧生
items.desc_en: Malcolm Timbrell's wife and their friends are thought to have died when a devastating wildfire tore through their village in Spain.
items.desc_zh: 马尔科姆·廷布雷尔（Malcolm Timbrell）的妻子和他们的朋友被认为在一场毁灭性的野火席卷西班牙村庄时丧生。

items.title_en: Bison rams grandfather in Yellowstone Park, knocking him metres into the air
items.title_zh: 野牛在黄石公园撞倒祖父，把他撞到几米高的空中
items.desc_en: The man and his grandson appeared a safe distance away from the bison before it quickly chased them down.
items.desc_zh: 这名男子和他的孙子出现在距离野牛安全距离的地方，随后野牛迅速追赶了他们。

items.title_en: Volkswagen planning to cut up to 100,000 jobs globally
items.title_zh: 大众汽车计划在全球范围内裁员至多10万人
items.desc_en: The group, which includes Porsche and Audi, has faced a steep fall in profits and tough competition from China.
items.desc_zh: 该集团包括保时捷和奥迪，面临着利润大幅下滑和来自中国的激烈竞争。

items.title_en: Trump recommends Lindsey Graham's sister serve as interim senator for South Carolina
items.title_zh: 特朗普推荐林赛格雷厄姆的妹妹担任南卡罗来纳州临时参议员
items.desc_en: The death of Sen. Lindsey Graham ignited a scramble among South Carolina Republicans to prepare for a special primary election to replace him on the GOP ticket.
items.desc_zh: 参议员林赛·格雷厄姆 (Lindsey Graham) 的去世引发了南卡罗来纳州共和党人的一场争夺战，他们准备举行特别初选，以取代他的共和党席位。

items.title_en: UK-Switzerland deal to scrap roaming charges and allow Britons to use e-gates
items.title_zh: 英国与瑞士达成协议取消漫游费并允许英国人使用电子门
items.desc_en: The UK signs a new services deal with Switzerland it says will increase exports by £5.2bn annually "in the long run".
items.desc_zh: 英国与瑞士签署了一项新的服务协议，称“从长远来看”将每年增加出口 52 亿英镑。

items.title_en: 'Hero, legend, sweetheart': Tributes to Jurassic Park actor Sam Neill, who has died aged 78
items.title_zh: “英雄、传奇、甜心”：向去世 78 岁的《侏罗纪公园》演员山姆·尼尔致敬
items.desc_en: Friends, politicians and fellow film stars remember Neill following his "sudden and unexpected" death.
items.desc_zh: 尼尔的朋友、政客和电影明星都对他“突然而意外”的去世表示怀念。

items.title_en: German court convicts Iraqi couple of enslaving Yazidi girls
items.title_zh: 德国法院判定伊拉克夫妇奴役雅兹迪女孩有罪
items.desc_en: The pair, named only as Twana H.S. and Asia R. A., left Germany for Iraq in 2015 and became members of the Islamic State group.
items.desc_zh: 两人的名字分别为 Twana H.S. Asia R. A. 于 2015 年离开德国前往伊拉克，并成为伊斯兰国组织的成员。

items.title_en: loopclub
items.title_zh: loopclub
items.desc_en: The shared drum machine to jam with strangers or with Claude
items.desc_zh: 与陌生人或克劳德一起即兴演奏的共享鼓机

items.title_en: Flyout
items.title_zh: Flyout
items.desc_en: Rich-text notes that fly out from your Mac's screen edge
items.desc_zh: 从 Mac 屏幕边缘飞出的富文本注释

items.title_en: VocalVia
items.title_zh: VocalVia
items.desc_en: Turn documents and articles into editable multi-voice audio
items.desc_zh: 将文档和文章转换为可编辑的多语音音频

items.title_en: 10 years of Pokémon Go and the millions still trying to catch 'em all
items.title_zh: 《Pokémon Go》问世 10 周年，数百万人仍在尝试捕捉它们
items.desc_en: Michael Steranka, vice president at the mobile game's owner Scopely, says it has always been about bringing people together.
items.desc_zh: 手机游戏所有者 Scopely 的副总裁迈克尔·斯特兰卡 (Michael Steranka) 表示，这款游戏一直致力于将人们聚集在一起。

items.title_en: Goose Ads Remixer
items.title_zh: Goose Ads Remixer
items.desc_en: Remix the ads already winning in your niche
items.desc_zh: 重新组合已经在您的利基市场中获胜的广告

items.title_en: Trump Accounts
items.title_zh: Trump Accounts
items.desc_en: Build long-term financial security for your child
items.desc_zh: 为您的孩子建立长期的财务保障

items.title_en: Altersend
items.title_zh: Altersend
items.desc_en: File transfer with no cloud storage, no account, no limits
items.desc_zh: 文件传输无云存储、无账户、无限制

items.title_en: Meta pulls new AI image feature after days of backlash
items.title_zh: 经过几天的强烈反对后，Meta 取消了新的人工智能图像功能
items.desc_en: Meta's release this week of an AI feature that let people alter Instagram content drew swift blowback.
items.desc_zh: Meta 本周发布了一项人工智能功能，可以让人们改变 Instagram 内容，但很快就引起了反弹。

items.title_en: Is the Assassin's Creed Black Flag remake worth the 13 year wait?
items.title_zh: 《刺客信条：黑旗》重制版值得 13 年的等待吗？
items.desc_en: The BBC's Tom Gerken plays the much-anticipated pirate game which has been remade from the ground up.
items.desc_zh: BBC 的汤姆·格肯 (Tom Gerken) 扮演了这款备受期待的海盗游戏，该游戏已从头开始重制。

items.title_en: Apple sues OpenAI, its employees claiming theft of trade secrets
items.title_zh: 苹果起诉 OpenAI，其员工声称窃取商业机密
items.desc_en: Apple said in a Friday lawsuit that OpenAI’s nascent hardware business is “rotten to its core.”
items.desc_zh: 苹果在周五的诉讼中表示，OpenAI 新兴的硬件业务“已经烂到了核心”。

items.title_en: EU threatens Meta with fines over 'addictive' Facebook and Instagram
items.title_zh: 欧盟因 Facebook 和 Instagram 上瘾而对 Meta 进行罚款威胁
items.desc_en: Regulators say features such as infinite scroll contribute to "compulsive use" and "unhealthy habits".
items.desc_zh: 监管机构表示，无限滚动等功能会导致“强迫性使用”和“不健康的习惯”。

items.title_en: Sourclip
items.title_zh: Sourclip
items.desc_en: Turn NotebookLM into a complete research workflow
items.desc_zh: 将 NotebookLM 转变为完整的研究工作流程

items.title_en: Big tech must deal with scam ads under Ofcom proposals
items.title_zh: 根据 Ofcom 的提议，大型科技公司必须处理诈骗广告
items.desc_en: Ofcom says more than half of UK adults have encountered potentially fraudulent ads online.
items.desc_zh: Ofcom 表示，超过一半的英国成年人在网上遇到过潜在的欺诈性广告。

items.title_en: Claude Overlay
items.title_zh: Claude Overlay
items.desc_en: A floating Claude Code chat that sees your screen
items.desc_zh: 浮动的克劳德代码聊天可以看到您的屏幕

items.title_en: BugShot
items.title_zh: BugShot
items.desc_en: Discover, fix, capture, and report bugs in one shot
items.desc_zh: 一次性发现、修复、捕获和报告错误

items.title_en: 'Cool in 90 seconds' - the fake portable air conditioners sweeping the internet
items.title_zh: “90秒制冷”——假冒移动空调席卷网络
items.desc_en: The ASA says adverts claiming small devices can rapidly cool rooms were too good to be true.
items.desc_zh: ASA 表示，声称小型设备可以快速冷却房间的广告好得令人难以置信。

items.title_en: Pressure builds on Europe's biggest port to be greener
items.title_zh: 欧洲最大港口面临更加环保的压力
items.desc_en: A lawsuit demands that the Port of Rotterdam moves faster to cut its dependence on fossil fuel firms.
items.desc_zh: 一项诉讼要求鹿特丹港加快行动，减少对化石燃料公司的依赖。

items.title_en: PgDog
items.title_zh: PgDog
items.desc_en: Scale PostgreSQL without changing your app
items.desc_zh: 无需更改应用程序即可扩展 PostgreSQL

items.title_en: Porn site company fined £630,000 over failed age checks
items.title_zh: 色情网站公司因未通过年龄检查被罚款 63 万英镑
items.desc_en: Ofcom has fined a slew of sites it says are failing to prevent children accessing their adult content.
items.desc_zh: Ofcom 对大量网站进行了罚款，称其未能阻止儿童访问其成人内容。

items.title_en: Sales Studio
items.title_zh: Sales Studio
items.desc_en: Private studio for live demos on macOS
items.desc_zh: 在 macOS 上进行现场演示的私人工作室

items.title_en: ClawTeams
items.title_zh: ClawTeams
items.desc_en: The first goal-driven, proactive AI team for e-commerce
items.desc_zh: 第一个目标驱动、积极主动的电子商务人工智能团队

items.title_en: Outcry as Meta lets users make AI images from public Instagram profile pics
items.title_zh: Meta 允许用户从公开的 Instagram 个人资料照片制作人工智能图像，引起强烈抗议
items.desc_en: The tech giant said people can opt out - but privacy campaigners called it a "recipe for disaster".
items.desc_zh: 这家科技巨头表示，人们可以选择退出，但隐私活动人士称这是“灾难的秘诀”。

items.title_en: Breva
items.title_zh: Breva
items.desc_en: Turn your Mac trackpad into a gentle breathing guide
items.desc_zh: 将您的 Mac 触控板变成轻柔的呼吸指南

items.title_en: Tech Life
items.title_zh: 科技生活
items.desc_en: The impact screen time is having on younger children.
items.desc_zh: 屏幕时间对年幼的孩子有影响。

items.title_en: AutoShelf 2.0
items.title_zh: AutoShelf 2.0
items.desc_en: Auto-organize files on your Mac now with MCP & CLI support
items.desc_zh: 现在通过 MCP 和 CLI 支持在 Mac 上自动组织文件

items.title_en: Robots available for rent: But what can they do?
items.title_zh: 可供出租的机器人：但它们能做什么？
items.desc_en: Robotics tech is changing fast, so for many it makes sense to rent a robot.
items.desc_zh: 机器人技术日新月异，因此对于许多人来说，租用机器人是有意义的。

items.title_en: Microsoft cuts 4,800 jobs and shrinks Xbox in 'significant restructure'
items.title_zh: 微软在“重大重组”中裁员 4,800 人并缩小 Xbox 规模
items.desc_en: The sweeping layoffs equate to 2.1% of Microsoft's workforce, with 1,600 immediate job losses at Xbox.
items.desc_zh: 这次大规模裁员相当于微软员工总数的 2.1%，Xbox 立即失业 1,600 人。

items.title_en: Animos App
items.title_zh: Animos App
items.desc_en: Showcase your designs in motion
items.desc_zh: 展示您的动态设计

items.title_en: Tech Life
items.title_zh: 科技生活
items.desc_en: We hear concerns that shadow banning is limiting access to health advice for women.
items.desc_zh: 我们听到有人担心影子禁令限制了女性获得健康建议的机会。

items.title_en: Pazi
items.title_zh: Pazi
items.desc_en: An AI team that puts your idea in motion
items.desc_zh: 人工智能团队将您的想法付诸实践
